chunks.title: The Harlotry of Israel and Judah
chunks.reason: Yahweh addresses the people's spiritual adultery using the metaphor of a divorced wife.

chunks.title: Israel and Judah Compared
chunks.reason: A narrative recounting Yahweh's past dealings with Israel and Judah regarding their faithlessness.

chunks.title: Call to Return for Israel
chunks.reason: Yahweh pronounces a judgment and promise of restoration specifically directed toward faithless Israel.

chunks.title: Confession and Promise of Healing
chunks.reason: The people respond with a collective prayer acknowledging their sin and seeking Yahweh's healing.
